---
title: "io"
---

Routines for input and output to files

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`io.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/io.py)
:::


## API Reference

### `with_dill` {#with_dill}

```python
class with_dill
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/io.py#L6){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `with_dill.dump` {#with_dill-dump}

```python
def dump(obj, path: str)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/io.py#L8){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `with_dill.load` {#with_dill-load}

```python
def load(path: str)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/io.py#L13){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

### `with_yaml` {#with_yaml}

```python
class with_yaml
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/io.py#L19){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `with_yaml.load` {#with_yaml-load}

```python
def load(path: str)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/io.py#L21){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `with_yaml.dump` {#with_yaml-dump}

```python
def dump(df, path: str)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/io.py#L27){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
